## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and resolve discrepancies in 2024 tax calculations for Marcel's LLC, focusing on revenue recognition, expense categorization, and potential tax liability.](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Revenue recognition needs adjustment from $1.4M to $1.141M (cash basis)](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Significant expenses were removed (\~$500k) and additional income added (\~$300k), explaining the unexpected tax increase](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Estimated taxable income around $200k after adjustments, subject to verification](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Home office and vehicle depreciation need to be properly accounted for](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

## Topics

### Revenue Recognition and Cash vs. Accrual Basis

  - [Current QuickBooks setup: Revenue on cash basis, expenses on accrual basis](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Agreed to use $1.141M as revenue figure (cash basis) instead of $1.4M](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Some invoices created in December for January kickoffs were incorrectly recognized in 2024](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Decision to recognize revenue after asset transfer date to C-Corp, reducing LLC's taxable income](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)

### Expense Categorization and Deductions

  - [Home office deduction: Previously $30k, needs to be reinstated (17% of square footage)](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Vehicle purchase ($110k) to be considered for Section 179 accelerated depreciation](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Gas expenses potentially miscategorized (only handful in QuickBooks vs. 50 transactions in Airtable)](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [Food/entertainment expenses to be adjusted to 50% deductible](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)

### Tax Liability Estimation

  - [Rough calculation: $276k profit (from Airtable) - $110k (car) - $10k (home office) ≈ $200k taxable income](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [W-2 income expected to be net positive or neutral due to overpayment](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Ericksson to compare Chase 5042 credit card transactions in Airtable vs. QuickBooks for accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)

### QuickBooks vs. Airtable Reconciliation

  - [Airtable serving as a "gut check" for transaction categorization and completeness](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Discrepancies found in gas transactions and potentially other categories](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Ericksson to export and compare Chase 5042 data between systems](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Adjust revenue recognition to $1.141M (cash basis) in tax calculations](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Reinstate home office deduction and verify vehicle depreciation options](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Ericksson to review and reconcile Chase 5042 transactions between Airtable and QuickBooks](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Verify and adjust expense categorizations, particularly for gas and meals/entertainment](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Provide updated numbers to Riot (tax preparers) for final tax liability calculation](https://fathom.video/share/izFGTKGCTFkDyVkvErwpoPuFxhjkEAxA?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
